name: refresh
title: rosync refresh
description: Refreshes generated Ro Sync agent docs without starting the daemon.
notes: Updates `ro-sync.md`, `AGENTS.md`, `CLAUDE.md`, and `.codex/config.toml` while preserving project notes outside generated blocks.
When Wally is enabled or a `wally.toml` is present, the regenerated `AGENTS.md` block embeds the resolved Wally settings and package config.
